calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-28-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The matter was called for hearing on Amended Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary.

The Court noted that the petitioner had not corrected the procedural deficiencies previously identified by the probate examiner, despite several continuances. There being no appearance, the Court took the matter off calendar without prejudice.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported. (D204)
